title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Sports Authority India

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Sports Authority India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Sports Authority India in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Sports Authority India:
Sports Authority India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sports Authority India!
